questionText: Complete a frase com a forma gramatical correta: 'By the time we ______ at the airport, the flight had already departed.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'We checked ______ the hotel at noon and went straight to our room.'
Qual é o artigo correto na frase: 'We took ______ Eurostar from London to Paris, which was a remarkable experience.'
Selecione a forma verbal correta: 'The tour guide suggested that we ______ the museum early to avoid crowds.'
Complete com a forma correta do verbo: 'Passengers ______ to board the aircraft 30 minutes before departure.'
Escolha a preposição correta: 'We were amazed ______ the breathtaking views from the summit.'
Qual forma verbal completa corretamente a frase: 'The travellers ______ their bags and proceeded to the departure gate.'
Selecione o pronome relativo correto: 'The hotel ______ we stayed last summer has won several awards since then.'
Complete a frase com a forma modal correta: 'You ______ book your tickets in advance during peak season to secure a seat.'
Escolha a forma correta do adjetivo: 'The ______ route through the Alps offers spectacular scenery.'
Selecione a preposição correta: 'The ferry departs ______ the pier at 8 a.m. every morning.'
Complete a frase: 'The customs officer asked us ______ our passports and boarding passes.'
Escolha a forma comparativa correta: 'Travelling by train is far ______ than driving through the city centre.'
Selecione a conjunção correta: 'We decided to take a detour ______ we could visit the ancient ruins along the way.'
Complete com a forma verbal correta: 'The airline ______ us compensation for the delayed flight.'
Escolha a forma correta do verbo modal: 'You ______ have packed lighter; we only have a short walk to the hotel.'
Selecione o determinante correto: 'We spent ______ time exploring the local markets before heading back.'
Complete a frase com a estrutura condicional correta: 'Had we booked earlier, we ______ a better rate for the cruise.'
Escolha a forma correta da voz passiva: 'All carry-on luggage ______ before passengers board the aircraft.'
Selecione a construção participial correta: '______ through customs, we finally made our way to the arrivals hall.'
Complete com a preposição mais precisa: 'The itinerary was meticulously planned ______ account of potential weather disruptions.'
Escolha a forma verbal correta para o discurso indireto: 'The flight attendant announced that the plane ______ shortly.'
Selecione a forma gerundial ou infinitiva correta: 'I vividly remember ______ into Tokyo for the first time; the skyline was awe-inspiring.'
Complete com a expressão idiomática gramaticalmente correta: 'Despite the turbulence, the pilot ______ the situation under control throughout the flight.'
Escolha a construção nominal correta: 'The ______ of travellers through border control was considerably slower than expected.'
Selecione a forma verbal correta do subjuntivo: 'The travel agent recommended that every passenger ______ travel insurance before departure.'
Complete com a estrutura de inversão correta: 'Not only ______ the train delayed, but our hotel reservation had also been cancelled.'
Escolha a forma correta do verbo na oração relativa: 'The guidebook, ______ extensively by seasoned travellers, proved invaluable throughout our journey.'
Selecione a preposição mais adequada ao registro formal: 'Passengers travelling ______ business class are entitled to an additional luggage allowance.'
Complete com a forma aspectual correta: 'By the end of this trip, we ______ through twelve different countries.'
Escolha a forma nominal correta: 'The ______ of the visa application was unexpectedly straightforward given the destination's requirements.'
Selecione a estrutura modal perfeita correta: 'The luggage ______ lost during the connecting flight, but fortunately it was recovered.'
Complete a frase com a conjunção de contraste mais precisa: 'The resort was luxurious; ______, the service fell far short of our expectations.',
Escolha a forma verbal correta para exprimir especulação no passado: 'She wasn't at the check-in desk; she ______ gone through the automated kiosk.'
Selecione a estrutura de ênfase (cleft sentence) correta: '______ the sheer unpredictability of weather conditions that makes mountaineering expeditions so perilous.'
Complete com a forma participial correta na construção absoluta: '______ the itinerary carefully, the expedition team set out at dawn.'
Selecione a forma verbal mais adequada ao contexto formal: 'It is imperative that the airline ______ full reimbursement to passengers affected by the cancellation.'
Escolha a estrutura condicional de terceira geração (mixed conditional) correta: 'If she ______ the local customs beforehand, she wouldn't be so uncomfortable now.'
Complete com o conector de coesão textual mais preciso e de registro mais elevado: 'The border crossing was chaotic; ______, our documentation was impeccable and we proceeded without incident.'
Selecione a construção passiva mais adequada: 'The ancient ruins ______ to have been a major trade hub during the Bronze Age.'
Escolha a estrutura de inversão enfática correta: 'Scarcely ______ the departure lounge when the boarding announcement was made.'
Complete com a forma gerundial ou infinitiva mais precisa no contexto: 'The mountaineers risked ______ caught in a blizzard by pressing on despite the deteriorating conditions.'
Selecione a preposição composta mais adequada ao contexto formal: 'The expedition was postponed ______ the adverse meteorological forecasts for the following week.'
Escolha a forma correta da oração concessiva com inversão: '______ the discomfort of a long-haul flight, the destination more than compensated for the journey.'
Selecione a estrutura nominal complexa correta: 'The ______ of travellers to overly romanticise their destination often leads to significant disappointment upon arrival.'
Complete com a construção modal mais precisa para exprimir crítica formal a uma ação passada: 'The tour operator ______ disclosed all surcharges upfront, as required by consumer protection law.'
Escolha a forma verbal mais adequada na construção com 'wish' para exprimir arrependimento no passado: 'I wish I ______ that off-the-beaten-track village; it was apparently quite extraordinary.'
Selecione a construção participial mais sofisticada: 'The passport, ______ multiple times over its ten-year lifespan, bore testament to decades of incessant travel.'
Complete com a estrutura de foco correto (pseudo-cleft): '______ struck me most about the Venetian canals was the uncanny silence that pervades the city at night.'
Escolha a preposição mais precisa na expressão prepositional avançada: 'The visa was granted ______ the condition that the applicant would not seek employment during their stay.'
Selecione a forma verbal mais adequada para exprimir uma ação habitual interrompida no passado: 'We ______ stay at this small family-run inn every summer, but it closed down a few years ago.'
